name: Idle Tomato Clicker
description: Tomato Clicker - Idle Simulator is a fun and addictive clicker game where players grow their wealth by collecting tomatoes. Players tap the big tomato button to gather tomatoes, convert these tomatoes into money , and invest in upgrades to build their farming empire. The game offers a growth journey starting from a tiny tomato all the way to a massive agricultural and real estate fortune.
instructions: Tomato Harvesting At the heart of the game is a giant tomato button Every time you tap you earn tomatoes These tomatoes become your main source of income Tomatoes rarr Money You keep the game rsquo s economy running by converting the tomatoes
